title: Interactive Krona Taxonomic Classification of Historic Thylacine and Modern Dunnart Transcriptomic Data
author: Kitty, Howard
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This archive contains interactive Krona taxonomic visualisations generated from Kraken2 classifications of RNA sequencing data derived from historic thylacine (Thylacinus cynocephalus) museum tissues and modern fat-tailed dunnart (Sminthopsis crassicaudata) reference tissues. These files form part of the supplementary material for the Master of Science thesis: Howard, K. (2026). Interpreting Historic RNA from Museum Specimens of the Extinct Thylacine. University of Melbourne. The Krona plots allow hierarchical exploration of taxonomic composition across tissues and support the assessment of endogenous molecular origin described in the thesis (Aim 1). All classifications were generated using Kraken2 with custom reference databases as detailed in the Methods section.
